workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: I have this exec meeting notes from Iron Creek Mining that needs triage this. The customer escalated this morning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 13:08 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Iron Creek Mining competitive positioning

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 14:15 EST
Subject: Follow-up: competitive positioning Review

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-N trap (Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-N failure mode (Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct competitive positioning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-N -- Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
